---
title: "CV"
---

A PDF version of my CV is available here:

[Download CV](files/CV - Ajay Dev.pdf)

## Education

**PhD in Astrophysics**  
International Centre for Radio Astronomy Research, University of Western Australia, Perth, Australia  
2022--2026  

Thesis: *Hot Gas, Cold Gas, and Stars: Mapping the Halo Baryon Budget in the Local Universe*  
Supervisors: Prof. Simon Driver and Dr. Martin Meyer

**Integrated Master of Science in Physics**  
National Institute of Science Education and Research, Bhubaneswar, India  
2016--2021  

Thesis: *Detection of WHIM between cluster pairs using the SZ Effect*  
DST-INSPIRE Fellow, Government of India

## Academic honours

- Best Talk, 2nd Place, Astronomical Society of Australia Annual Scientific Meeting, 2025
- PhD Scholarship, University of Western Australia, 2022--2025
- DST-INSPIRE Fellowship, Department of Science and Technology, Government of India, 2016--2021
- Academic Excellence Award, NISER Bhubaneswar, 2016--2017

## Survey memberships

GAMA, DEVILS, 4MOST/WAVES, 4MOST/4HS, ASKAP/DINGO, ASKAP/WALLABY, ASKAP/EMU, EMPOWER

## Observing and computing experience

- 10 nights of observing with 4MOST instrument on VISTA (part of SPV observations) at ESO Paranal Observatory, Chile
- Co-I, EMPOWER Survey, VLT/KMOS, 150 hours
- ESO VISTA Telescope, 4MOST observing, 10 nights, Paranal, Chile
- Blanco Telescope, DECam, 2 nights, remote observing
- GMRT, 1 night
- Co-I, Pawsey Merit Allocation Scheme, 1M CPU hours
- R, Python, Bash, and high-performance computing

## Community and outreach

- Organiser, Journal Club, 2022--2024
- Volunteer, ICRAR night sky and public outreach events, 2022--2024
- Volunteer, ASTROFEST, 2022 and 2024
- Night-sky observing session, 2 Rocks Primary School, 2023
- NISER Astronomy Club outreach events, 2016--2021
